description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the barichello/godot-ci:4.2 Docker image for the build_and_test stage and python:latest for a license_test job. Define stages build_and_test and deploy. In the build_and_test stage add build:linux, build:osx, build:windows, build:plugins, build:server, and build:sources jobs, each marked interruptible, limited to the dev@SuperTuxParty/SuperTuxParty branch and tags, producing artifacts of the build directory and a source zip that expire in one week; the build jobs run mkdir build (or mkdir -p build/plugins), then invoke godot --headless --export-release with the appropriate target names, with build:server also downloading and extracting the Linux server binary, and build:sources zipping the repository, while license_test installs tqdm and runs python check_license.py but skips tags. Add a deploy_nightly job that depends on all build jobs, runs only on the dev@SuperTuxParty/SuperTuxParty branch, sets up SSH with $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY and $SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS, downloads and extracts the itch.io butler tool, adds it to PATH, and runs ./release.sh nightly $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA. Also add a deploy_release job that runs only on tags, performs the same SSH setup, installs curl, downloads butler, adds it to PATH, and runs ./release.sh release $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.
